text: The clean lines, glass walls, and cool lighting evoke a sense of modernity and precision. Yet, as I move closer to the R+D exhibit, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and contemplation. The space invites innovation and thought, but its sterility also inspires a hint of detachment. I am present, yet hovering at the edge of immersion, wondering about the nature of progress and the way humans shape, and are shaped by, their creations.
